alt.name: Kicking Horse — Kick Ass Dark Roast
alt.story: Founded in 1996 by Elana Rosenfeld and Leo Johnson in Invermere, BC — a small mountain town in the Canadian Rockies. They started roasting in their garage and built one of Canada's most beloved coffee brands. Every batch is still roasted with a view of the Rocky Mountains. Certified organic & fair trade.
alt.storyLoc: Invermere, BC — heart of the Canadian Rockies
alt.storyHook: Organic coffee roasted in the Rockies since '96 — from a garage to a Canadian icon.

alt.name: Salt Spring Moka Java
alt.story: Born on Salt Spring Island in 1996, this small-batch roaster was one of Canada's first certified organic, fair trade coffee companies. They're a B Corp with deep commitment to social and environmental responsibility. Beans roasted on the island and shipped fresh.
alt.storyLoc: Salt Spring Island, BC — Gulf Islands
alt.storyHook: Small-batch organic roasting on a Gulf Island — B Corp, fair trade, shipped fresh.

alt.name: Ethical Bean Lush Medium-Dark
alt.story: Founded in Vancouver in 2003, Ethical Bean was one of the first carbon-neutral coffee companies in North America. Every bag has a QR code so you can trace your coffee from farm to cup. They roast in small batches in East Vancouver and are 100% fair trade certified.
alt.storyHook: Canada's first carbon-neutral coffee — trace every bag from farm to cup via QR code.

Kicking Horse.story: One of Canada's most iconic coffee brands! Founded in 1996 in the Rocky Mountain town of Invermere, BC. They roast organic, fair trade beans at their mountain facility. From a garage operation to a national favourite.
Kicking Horse.storyHook: Organic coffee roasted in the Rockies since 1996 — from a garage to a Canadian icon.

Tim Hortons.story: A true Canadian institution! Founded in 1964 by hockey player Tim Horton in Hamilton, Ontario. Now headquartered in Toronto. Tim Hortons is woven into Canadian culture from coast to coast.
Tim Hortons.storyHook: Founded by hockey legend Tim Horton in 1964 — Canada's coffee, coast to coast.

alt.name: Pilot Coffee Voyage Blend
alt.story: Pilot Coffee started in 2009 in Toronto's east end, founded by friends passionate about specialty coffee. They operate multiple cafés across Toronto and roast all their beans in-house. Known for meticulous sourcing and small-batch quality.
alt.storyHook: Small-batch specialty roasting from Toronto's east end since 2009 — café culture meets craft.
